intro: Allium sativum syrup, also known as garlic syrup, is a sweet and flavorful liquid made from the extract of garlic cloves. This syrup is often used in traditional medicine to aid in digestion, reduce blood pressure, and combat various health conditions due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be consumed on its own or added to food and beverages to provide a hint of garlic flavor while reaping its potential health benefits.
